textByHash.20ecaa08062a7dde1a2fd2dd2d095dc05b138795: Human. Are you here to trade ore? If not, I must point out that I have a lot to be getting on with.
textByHash.73e8f6f2436eeebc74ab3fc7b91d30737377ae57: Alternatively, perhaps you wish to trade ore? If not, I must once again point out that I have a lot of work to do.
textByHash.d0d6d3fac637f7135bfc1cf938d98b47d112118d: This is Deepfin Point. Here, my workers and I have set up the finest mining operation you'll ever find. If you wish to do any mining yourself, you are more than welcome to.
